world.headline: Pentagon confirms Israel bugged US peace negotiators' phones

main.text: 🚨🇺🇸🇮🇱 The Pentagon espionage bombshell just got worse... Israel has been eavesdropping on the American peace negotiators themselves (Witkoff, Colby, DiMino). Threat level higher than any other ally.
main.note: Primary reporting citing NYT/Pentagon on specific bugs against named US officials.

perspectives.text: Israel is scrambling to complete their takeover of the U.S. before the American people have time to organize nationwide pogroms.
perspectives.note: Opinion framing espionage as takeover; conservative foreign influence concern.

perspectives.text: Thomas Massie just called Section 224 of the 2027 NDAA a treasonous merger of the Israeli and American militaries. Finally.
perspectives.note: Direct attribution to Rep. Massie on the NDAA linking provision.

world.headline: US-Israel intel sharing locked in by law, critics call it treason

main.text: TITLE XI SEC. 622: “Intelligence sharing ... with Israel SHALL NOT be suspended, reduced, or otherwise materially limited.” This is TREASON.
main.note: Exact statutory language from the bill.

perspectives.text: American soldiers deployed to defend Israel had their phones bugged and wiretapped by Mossad – New York Times
perspectives.note: Cites NYT on Mossad actions vs US troops.

perspectives.text: The US-Israel merger JUST GOT WORSE! The bill makes permanent intelligence sharing that can't be limited even by future presidents.
perspectives.note: Highlights the 'shall not be suspended' clause.

world.headline: Dave Matthews calls for end to violence in Gaza, West Bank, Lebanon and beyond

main.text: Dave Matthews: “I will never stop calling for an end to the violence in Gaza and the West Bank and Lebanon and for that matter the Congo and Sudan and Ukraine or the horrific violence against immigrants and their neighbors in our country”
main.note: Direct multi-conflict quote from the artist.

perspectives.text: We need to RALLY and DEMAND 622 of S 4615 AND Section 224 of NDAA FY 27 be STRIPPED out of legislation!
perspectives.note: Citizen call to strip the specific intel merger sections.

perspectives.text: someone should ask hunter biden about israel
perspectives.note: Sarcastic call for accountability on foreign business ties.

nation.headline: Elon tells followers the SAVE America Act is the only path to save democracy

main.text:
BREAKING: Elon Musk just told his 240 MILLIONS Followers that the only way to Save Democracy is to pass the Save America Act

“The only way to save democracy in America”

I ABSOLUTELY AGREE 💯
main.note: Elon statement on SAVE America Act as democracy safeguard.

perspectives.text: California’s blatant election fraud is what’s coming for the rest of the country if we don’t pass the SAVE America Act.
perspectives.note: Links CA fraud concerns to national SAVE Act need.

perspectives.text:
If @LeaderJohnThune would have passed the SAVE America Act months ago… 

Spencer Pratt wins the LA Mayor race by a landslide.
perspectives.note: Claims delayed Senate action altered a local election outcome.

nation.headline: ICE agents fire pepper balls at anti-ICE rioters blocking vehicles in street clashes

main.text:
JUST IN: ICE Agents have started to sh**t pepper balls at Anti ICE Rioters so vehicles can go through

I COULD WATCH THIS ALL DAY LONG

KEEP IT GOING 🔥
main.note: Video reporting on ICE using pepper balls during street clashes.

perspectives.text:
ICE Agent: “What you say? You gonna k*ll me? You gonna K*LL me?”. Now this Rioter is in a Jail cell

PROTECT ICE AT ALL COSTS 🙏
perspectives.note: Additional clip emphasizing agent protection during arrests.

main.text: Pass the SAVE America Act now!
main.note: Direct call to pass SAVE America Act; verifiable primary post.

free.headline: Andreessen on the "greengrocer lie" — why we chant slogans we know are false
free.text: Marc Andreessen on preference falsification: the 1985 Prague greengrocer parable, back again.
free.note: Andreessen unpacking Timur Kuran's "Private Truths, Public Lies" + Václav Havel's greengrocer parable. No speculation — maps directly onto modern forced public compliance.
